examples: The whole discharging work will be supervised by the chief stevedore.
Time lost for repairing stevedore damage is to count as laytime or time on demurrage.
He says he went there thinking he would be given work as a stevedore.
As boss of his own stevedore company and chairman of the Japan Harbour Transportation Association, the formidable Mr Takashima has threatened to ban all American ships from Japan.
